# Changelog

## 0.1.0

### :twisted_rightwards_arrows: Merged PRs

> This release includes **3** merged pull requests that have been successfully integrated into the codebase.

- **Deps**: Bump pnpm/action-setup from 5 to 6 by @dependabot in #3
- **Deps**: Bump actions/upload-pages-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot in #2
- **Deps**: Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot in #1

---

### :tada: New Features

- Initial DeviceBase JavaScript SDK implementation [`09035c3`](https://github.com/devicebase/js-devicebase/commit/09035c35880275f56e85975cbbbcf6b4aad788b3) by @Richie
